name: Progressive Context Injector
description: Agent-workspace-first progressive context injection for OpenClaw agents. Each agent is anchored by a workspace root with standard files and explicit shared contexts. Supports first-turn full injection, compact reminders on later turns, and on-demand workspace_context tool lookup.

standardWorkspaceFiles.description: Map of semantic slot keys to filenames for standard agent workspace files. Defaults: agents=AGENTS.md, soul=SOUL.md, user=USER.md, tools=TOOLS.md, memory=MEMORY.md, heartbeat=HEARTBEAT.md

sharedContexts.description: Named shared context definitions. Each key is a human-readable alias, value defines the file path and metadata.

path.description: Path to the shared context file, relative to workspace root.

description.description: Human-readable description of this shared context.

sections.description: Known section names for route table hints.

compactText.description: Short summary used in compact reminders on turn 2+.

routeTable.description: Route table entries scoped to this shared context.

agents.description: Per-agent configuration. Use '*' for wildcard defaults. Agent-specific keys merge over wildcard. Each agent declares its workspace root and context composition.

workspaceRoot.description: Agent workspace root directory, relative to workspace root. Use '.' for root workspace. Supports {agentId} template substitution.

workspaceFiles.description: List of standard workspace file slot keys to include for this agent (e.g. ['agents', 'soul', 'user']).

extraWorkspaceFiles.description: Additional non-standard workspace files. Map of key to filename, resolved relative to agent workspaceRoot.

injectSharedOnFirstTurn.description: Shared context names to inject in full on the first turn.

availableSharedContexts.description: Shared context names available on-demand but not injected on first turn.

bootstrapKeep.description: Bootstrap filenames to keep in full.

bootstrapCompact.description: Map of bootstrap filename to compact stub text.

routeTable.description: Topic-to-target route table. Targets use 'workspace:<key>' or 'shared:<name>#Section' format.

skipAgents.description: List of agent IDs to skip entirely.

bootstrapDedup.description: Enable same-name file deduplication during bootstrap. Defaults to true.

compactReminder.description: [DEPRECATED] Compact reminders are now generated dynamically from config.

compactReminderFile.description: [DEPRECATED] Compact reminders are now generated dynamically from config.
